{{CargoRelic
|name=Astronaut Cap
|class_id=20320
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This Astronaut Cap belonged to an alien race. Unlike Earthlings, this race lives on helium gas, so when they reach Earth, they need to wear a full protective suit. In particular, the hat on their head, which has a fully functional rebreather to ensure their survival outside the spacecraft.
|fame=15
|art=17
|fth=14
|civ=13
|tech=31
|ss1=Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail DEF +2<br>Time Machine LVL: 50/50
|ss2=Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail DEF +4<br>Time Machine LVL: 50/50
|ss3=Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail DEF +6<br>Time Machine LVL: 50/50
|ss4=Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail DEF +6<br>Time Machine LVL: 50/50
|ss7=Per 5 Time Machine LVLs, Snail DEF +6<br>Time Machine LVL: 50/50<br> (Awakened)
}}
